series_metadata.series_description: A file that contains documentation regarding an incarcerated person's visitors and visiting record.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: This file will be merged with incarcerated person master file upon incarcerated person's release from custody. ten (10) years final release, maximum expiration, death, definite expiration, etc. ; Electronic: This file will be merged with incarcerated person master file upon incarcerated person's release from custody. ten (10) years final release, maximum expiration, death, definite expiration, etc
